Package org.solenopsis.soap.tooling

Class NamedCredential2

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.tooling.SObject
org.solenopsis.soap.tooling.NamedCredential2
public class NamedCredential2 extends SObject

Java class for NamedCredential complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="NamedCredential">
   <complexContent>
     <extension base="{urn:sobject.tooling.soap.sforce.com}sObject">
       <sequence>
         <element name="AuthProviderId" type="{urn:tooling.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="AuthTokenEndpointUrl" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="AwsAccessKey" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="AwsAccessSecret" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="AwsRegion" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="AwsService" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CalloutStatus" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Certificate" type="{urn:sobject.tooling.soap.sforce.com}Certificate" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CertificateId" type="{urn:tooling.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CreatedBy" type="{urn:sobject.tooling.soap.sforce.com}User" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CreatedById" type="{urn:tooling.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CreatedDate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CustomHttpHeaders" type="{urn:tooling.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="DeveloperName" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Endpoint" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="FullName" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsDeleted" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="JwtAudience" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="JwtFormulaSubject" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="JwtIssuer" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="JwtSigningCertificate" type="{urn:sobject.tooling.soap.sforce.com}Certificate" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="JwtSigningCertificateId" type="{urn:tooling.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="JwtTextSubject" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="JwtValidityPeriodSeconds" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}int" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Language" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LastModifiedBy" type="{urn:sobject.tooling.soap.sforce.com}User" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LastModifiedById" type="{urn:tooling.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LastModifiedDate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ManageableState" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="MasterLabel" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Metadata" type="{urn:metadata.tooling.soap.sforce.com}NamedCredential" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="NamedCredentialParameters" type="{urn:tooling.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="NamedCredentialType" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="NamespacePrefix" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="OauthRefreshToken" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="OauthScope" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="OauthToken" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="OutboundNetworkConnection" type="{urn:sobject.tooling.soap.sforce.com}OutboundNetworkConnection" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="OutboundNetworkConnectionId" type="{urn:tooling.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Password" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="PrincipalType" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Protocol" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="SystemModstamp" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Username" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
       </sequence>
     </extension>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>
